assignments.name: Assign_Approver_Values_To_Deal_Teams
assignments.label: Assign Approver Values To Deal Teams

assignments.name: Assign_Approver_Values_To_Record_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Approver Values To Record Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Deal_Team_To_Single_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Deal Team To Single Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Triggering_Deal_To_List
assignments.label: Assign Triggering Deal To List and Assign Running User

decisions.name: Is_This_Deal_Approval_Or_Non_Deal_Approval
decisions.label: Is This Deal Approval Or Non Deal Approval?

decisions.name: Was_Approval_Rejected_OR_Given_OR_Resubmission_Requested
decisions.label: Was Approval Rejected OR Given OR Resubmission Requested?

decisions.name: Were_Deal_Teams_Found_For_Running_User
decisions.label: Were Deal Teams Found For Running User?

loops.name: Loop_Selected_Deal_Teams_Update_LOI
loops.label: Loop Selected Deal Teams - Update LOI

recordLookups.name: Get_All_Documentation_Approvers_For_Deal
recordLookups.label: Get All Documentation Approvers For Deal

recordLookups.name: Get_All_LOI_Approvers_For_Deal
recordLookups.label: Get All LOI Approvers For Deal
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7)

recordLookups.name: Get_Asset_In_Deal_Approvers_For_Running_User
recordLookups.label: Get Asset In Deal Approvers For Running User

recordLookups.name: Get_Manage_Deal_Approval_Permission_Set
recordLookups.label: Get Manage Deal Approval Permission Set

recordLookups.name: Get_Manage_Deal_Approval_Permission_Set_Assignment
recordLookups.label: Get Manage Deal Approval Permission Set Assignment

recordLookups.name: Get_Non_Deal_Approver_Deal_Team_Records_For_Running_User
recordLookups.label: Get Non Deal Approver Deal Team Records For Running User

recordLookups.name: Get_Open_LOI_Deal_Team_Records_For_Running_User
recordLookups.label: Get Open LOI Deal Team Records For Running User
recordLookups.filterLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 9 AND 10) AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8)

fields.name: NonApproverMessage
fields.fieldText: No approver records have been assigned to you for this approval request.

fields.name: ApprovalReminderSuccessText
fields.fieldText: Notifications have successfully been sent to all outstanding approvers.

subflows.description: Autolaunched flow to send a reminder notification to any outstanding approvers
subflows.name: Send_Approval_Reminder
subflows.label: Send Approval Reminder

variables.description: Please, select the role(s) that you wish to approve as.
variables.name: varValidationText
